name: Hirogin Holdings, Inc.
summary: Hirogin Holdings, Inc. operates as a bank holding company for The Hiroshima Bank, Ltd. that provides various financial services in Hiroshima, Okayama, Yamaguchi, and Ehime prefectures. The company offers deposits and loans; and financial instruments brokerage, receivable debts administration and recovery, asset management and investment, credit card, credit guarantee, factoring, and financing services, as well as consolidated accounting, printing, binding, collateral real estate valuation, and contract due diligence services. It operates 151 branches in Japan and representative offices in Shanghai, Bangkok, Singapore, and Hanoi. The company was founded in 1878 and is headquartered in Hiroshima, Japan.
